steps.title: Track the poem's movement
steps.content: The speaker first lists what others may think: that she loves or cares more than she does. She then says those impressions do not matter because she is self-complete.

steps.title: Choose the structure
steps.content: Choice A invents several cases where confidence helped her. Choice B says she wants connection, but she emphasizes going alone. Choice C mentions scenarios that the short poem does not recount. The structure moves from others' impressions to why they do not matter. The answer is D.
